ddls:
CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* The actual SQL text of the query */,
  "execution_time_ms" INTEGER /* Total execution time of the query in milliseconds */,
  "execution_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query was executed */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query (e.g., SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  "query_size" INTEGER /* Size of the query (e.g., number of rows processed) */,
  "query_error" TEXT /* Error message if the query fails */,
  "query_source" TEXT /* Source of the query (e.g., application, manual, scheduled job) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the query */,
  "file_scan_time_sec" REAL /* Time spent on file scanning operations in seconds */,
  "file_scan_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total execution time spent on file scanning */,
  "filter_time_sec" REAL /* Time spent on filtering operations in seconds */,
  "filter_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total execution time spent on filtering */,
  "join_time_sec" REAL /* Time spent on join operations in seconds */,
  "join_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total execution time spent on join operations */,
  "sort_time_sec" REAL /* Time spent on sorting operations in seconds */,
  "sort_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total execution time spent on sorting operations */,
  "memory_usage_kb" REAL /* Memory usage during query execution */,
  "cpu_usage_percent" REAL /* CPU usage during query execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_performance_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, performance analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_optimization" (
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization record */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the query being optimized */,
  "optimization_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy used for optimization */,
  "optimization_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the optimization was performed */,
  "optimized_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who performed the optimization */,
  "optimization_status" TEXT /* Status of the optimization (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "optimization_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the optimization process */,
  "estimated_improvement" REAL /* Estimated improvement in performance after optimization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_optimization_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_optimization_optimized_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("optimized_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the query being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the query */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the query details were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query details were accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_access_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "generation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  "report_size_kb" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in kilobytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring tool */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration with the QPMS */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for accessing the monitoring tool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the monitoring tool was integrated */,
  "last_synced_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tool was last synchronized with the QPMS */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tool integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring tool being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the tool */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the tool was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, query) */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tool was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_access_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES monitoring_tools ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency record */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the main query */,
  "dependent_query_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dependent query (e.g., a subquery or CTE) */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., subquery, CTE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_dependencies_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_dependencies_dependent_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the query */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_tags_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_tags_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., CPU usage, memory usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric at the time of capture */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was captured */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., %, MB, sec) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., system, application) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
